title: habenaria spiralis
intro: Habenaria spiralis, also known as the spiral orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Habenaria spiralis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Habenaria spiralis include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal products.
